caption: A man with a distinctive, towering silver-grey hairstyle and glasses is recorded in a studio setting for a podcast. He wears a white button-down shirt with gold-colored suspenders and a patterned tie, and he is wearing black over-ear headphones while speaking into a black professional microphone positioned in front of him. Behind him, a woman with bright pink hair wearing a green outfit is partially visible. The background includes a framed picture of a face and a white-framed logo featuring a yellow shield. On-screen graphics include a logo that reads "BEST TALK PODCAST" on the left and red text on the right that says "BEST TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, speaking into the microphone and shifting his gaze slightly downward and toward the side as he talks.
